Habitat Safari: Summer Camp, Ages 5-6
events.description: Habitat Safari | June 8–12, 2026 Ages 5-6 Habitat Safari takes young explorers on a journey through various natural habitats. Campers will discover how plants and animals survive in forests, wetlands, deserts, and gardens through hands-on activities, sensory exploration, crafts, and outdoor scavenger hunts. Pollinator Plant Sale
events.description: ONE-DAY POLLINATOR PLANT SALE! Join us at Texas Discovery Gardens on Saturday, June 13 , from 9 a.m. – 1 p.m. for our pollinator one-day plant sale! We’ll have full availability of beautiful plants, including: Native plants Perennials Herbs Colorful annuals Come sip and shop while you browse. Beverages will be available! events.title: Bug Squad Adventures: Summer Camp, Ages 7-9
events.description: Bug Squad Adventures | June 15–19, 2026 Ages 7-9 Bug Squad Adventures combines STEAM activities with hands-on insect exploration. Campers learn about bugs and ecosystems through live insect encounters, outdoor bug hunts, and problem-solving challenges. Teamwork, curiosity, and creativity are encouraged throughout the week. events.description: Unwind, one stitch at a time! Meet other yarn lovers to share favorite techniques and patterns. All skill levels welcome. This program is intended for adults only.

events.title: Habitat Guardians: Summer Camp, Ages 10-12
events.description: Habitat Guardians | June 22–26, 2026 Ages 10-12 Habitat Guardians empowers campers to think about wildlife and the habitats they depend on. Through hands-on activities, campers explore how human actions affect wildlife and how individuals and communities can help protect ecosystems. This camp emphasizes stewardship, problem-solving, and real-world conservati

events.title: Once Upon A Garden: National Pollinator Week
events.description: National Pollinator Week A Once Upon a Garden Story Time Special SATURDAY, JUNE 27, 2026: 11AM With Author & Bee Keeper Shanna Upchurch Enjoy a delightful and captivating story, The Honeybee Highway. events.title: Homeschool Day: Plant Safari
events.description: 📅 July 2, 2026 | 1–3 p.m. 💲 Members: Free | Non-Members: Included with admission Embark on a leafy adventure through our tropical conservatory! Discover unique plants from around the world, and learn how they survive in the rainforest.

events.title: Fort Worth's Fourth
events.description: Fort Worth's largest Fourth of July celebration: festival food, cold drinks, kids' activities, live music, and fireworks along the Trinity River at Panther Island Pavilion. Gates open 5:00pm, fireworks at 9:30pm.

events.title: Animal Adventures, Summer Camp, Ages 5-6
events.description: Animal Adventures | July 6–10, 2026 Ages 5-6 Animal Adventures invites campers to explore the amazing world of animals, from insects and birds to reptiles and mammals.
